message.content:
Fetch this Wikipedia page and extract the complete list of municipalities (comuni) in the Province of Varese, Italy: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Province_of_Varese

Return just the list of municipality names, one per line. Include all comuni listed.

content.text: I'll fetch the Wikipedia page and extract the list of municipalities for you.
